content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.forge.forge_engine
FILE: cosmos/core/forge/forge_engine.py (561 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: FORGE Engine - Core Orchestration
===================================

The brain of FORGE. Orchestrates multi-model agents through the
plan-execute-verify pipeline using swarm deliberation.

Unlike single-model approaches that degrade as context fills,
FORGE distributes work across multiple AI model

CLASSES:
- ForgeEngine: Main FORGE orchestration engine.

Coordinates the swarm through structured devel
  Methods: async def research(self, topic: str, phase: ForgePhase=None) -> dict[str, str]
  Methods: async def deliberate(self, objective: str, context: str='', models: list[str]=None) -> dict
  Methods: async def execute_plan(self, plan: ForgePlan, dry_run: bool=False) -> dict
  Methods: async def verify_phase(self, phase: ForgePhase) -> dict
  Methods: async def quick(self, task_description: str) -> dict
  Methods: def get_progress(self) -> dict
  Methods: def get_cost_report(self) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def forge_quick(task: str, workspace: str='.') -> dict
- async def forge_plan(objective: str, context: str='', workspace: str='.') -> dict
- async def forge_execute(plan: ForgePlan, workspace: str='.', dry_run: bool=False) -> dict
